faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kanak Durga Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kanak Durga Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kanak Durga Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (162 km) and the nearest railway station is Jamshedpur (Tatanagar) (80 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kanak Durga Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kanak Durga Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kanak Durga Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kanak Durga Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kanak Durga Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chilkigarh, Jamboni (community development block), Jamboni, Gidhni, Bahiri.
